commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=f9e7fbff34b818fb2fe8810c4e0d9ac00182f050)
commands.review_summary:
The PR changes QA maturity scorecard coverage math to count distinct fulfilled coverage IDs, updates tests and report wording, regenerates maturity docs, and adds a QA maturity coverage investigation report.

PR surface: Source +1, Tests +198, Docs +584, Other 0. Total +783 across 9 files.

Reproducibility: yes. by source inspection: current main counts full taxonomy features, while the PR's tests show a one-of-two coverage-ID case should report 50%. I did not run tests because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Manual maintainer handling is needed because the PR is protected by the `maintainer` label and requires a conflict-aware rebase/regeneration decision before merge.

target.title: Count maturity coverage by coverage ID
target.body:
## What Problem This Solves

The maturity scorecard was still treating taxonomy feature fulfillment as all-or-nothing. That made partial coverage inside a multi-ID feature disappear from the public coverage percentage, even though coverage is tracked at coverage-ID granularity.

## Why This Change Was Made

This changes scorecard fulfillment math to use distinct primary-fulfilled coverage IDs over distinct required coverage IDs. Category-local readiness rows still show category coverage IDs, while global totals deduplicate IDs that appear in multiple categories.

The generated maturity docs were rerendered from the QA Profile Evidence artifact for Actions run 28008797812 after recomputing the embedded scorecard with the new math. The QA inventory investigation report was also added and updated to separate primary coverage score math from any-linked scenario metadata.

## User Impact

The public maturity scorecard now reports proportional coverage instead of undercounting partially covered multi-ID features. Current all-profile evidence renders as 79 of 1665 coverage IDs, or 4.7%, with surface/category averages updated accordingly.

## Evidence

- `pnpm docs:list`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/qa-lab/src/coverage-report.test.ts extensions/qa-lab/src/scorecard-evidence.test.ts test/scripts/render-maturity-docs.test.ts`
- `node --import tsx --input-type=module ... readValidatedQaMaturityScoreSources()`
- `pnpm maturity:check -- --evidence-dir .artifacts/maturity-evidence-run-28008797812`
- `node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p test/tsconfig/tsconfig.extensions.test.json --incremental --tsBuildInfoFile .artifacts/tsgo-cache/extensions-test.tsbuildinfo`
- `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base origin/main --prompt "Contract: this PR intentionally changes maturity coverage scoring from feature-level all-or-nothing fulfillment to distinct coverage-ID proportional fulfillment. Partial coverage of a multi-ID taxonomy feature must count proportionately by covered coverage IDs. Review only for bugs under that requested contract."`
target.author: romneyda
